)4Nr
text only argumentsz
html only argumentsz
--widthr)
z width of date column (default 2))
type
default
helpz
--linesr(
z)number of lines for each week (default 1)z
-sz	--spacingr
z"spacing between months (default 6)z
--monthsrw
months per row (default 3)z
--cssr
CSS to use for page)
--localez.locale to be used from month and weekday namesz
--encodingz
encoding to use for outputz
--type
text)
htmlz
output type (text or html))
choicesr
year number (1-9999))
nargsr
month number (1-12, text only)z/if --locale is specified --encoding is requiredr
